title: The end of the road for Union Stars
description: Union Stars CC, the winner of the Six Gun...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars CC, the winner of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League Competition, was outplayed in the past weekend’s qualifying matches.","html":"Union Stars CC, the winner of the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier League Competition, was outplayed in the past weekend’s qualifying matches."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These matches that involve the Western Province (Durbanville CC) and Boland winners (University of Stellenbosch) were played at the University of the Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars lost by 90 runs against Maties and 7 wickets against the top team - Durbanville.","html":"Union Stars lost by 90 runs against Maties and 7 wickets against the top team - Durbanville."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards are:","html":"The summarised scorecards are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maties vs Union Stars CC","html":"Maties vs Union Stars CC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maties 189 all out - 45.6 overs (Kent Goedeke 58, David Christie 36, Jason Muirhead 27, Regan Rhode 3/33, Lee Henry Meyer 2/31, Grant Esau 2/56, Corné Kennedy 2/15).","html":"Maties 189 all out - 45.6 overs (Kent Goedeke 58, David Christie 36, Jason Muirhead 27, Regan Rhode 3/33, Lee Henry Meyer 2/31, Grant Esau 2/56, Corné Kennedy 2/15)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 99 all out - 36.3 overs (Ross Boast 3/22, Matenzi Denega 2/18, Ryan Jairaj 2/24).","html":"Union Stars 99 all out - 36.3 overs (Ross Boast 3/22, Matenzi Denega 2/18, Ryan Jairaj 2/24)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Maties won by 90 runs.","html":"Maties won by 90 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Durbanville CC vs Union Stars CC","html":"Durbanville CC vs Union Stars CC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars 149/9 - 50 overs (Breyton Plaatjies 61, Joviano Tock 31,Leon Le Roux 4/26, Darian Naidoo 3/26).","html":"Union Stars 149/9 - 50 overs (Breyton Plaatjies 61, Joviano Tock 31,Leon Le Roux 4/26, Darian Naidoo 3/26)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Durbanville 150/3 (31.5 overs) (Fritz de Beer 55, Jean Strydom 41, Laurens Smit 36*, Regan Rhode 2/39)","html":"Durbanville 150/3 (31.5 overs) (Fritz de Beer 55, Jean Strydom 41, Laurens Smit 36*, Regan Rhode 2/39)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Durbanville CC won by 7 wickets.","html":"Durbanville CC won by 7 wickets."}]
